claims.detail: (dressed loop parameter lam' B_d = lam' int G_d^2 = 1.033 = O(1), in [0.5,1.5] -- MARGINAL, near the convergence boundary 1; the Brazovskii sea is strongly fluctuating even when dressed)

claims.name: s4_not_much_less_than_s3

claims.name: per_term_below_half_but_sum_marginal
claims.detail: (per-term s_4 ~ 0.041 < 1/2 (each skeleton term is small via a0), BUT with ratio ~1.03~1 the geometric SUM does not converge cleanly -- RES-5 closure needs RESUMMATION, not a geometric bound)

claims.name: res5_needs_resummation
claims.detail: (CONCLUSION: dressed loop parameter O(1) => the skeleton/loop series is MARGINAL (strong-coupling).
